response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience spanning frontend, backend, mobile, and embedded systems. Recent role at re:cinq directly aligns with the JD, including TypeScript/Node.js product work and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP). Solid background in testing, TDD, CI/CD, and multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang). Lacks explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience, and the current career gap plus short re:cinq tenure warrant some discussion, but the overall fit is well above the bar.
strengths: Recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent and MCP framework experience matching JD
13+ years across full stack with strong testing/TDD discipline (Vitest-adjacent, Selenium, Fluent-Asserts)
Polyglot (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent) with Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, AWS CDK
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience listed in the resume
Current career gap (caregiving) since Oct 2025 — availability and ramp-up to confirm
Short tenure at re:cinq (~6 months); depth of recent Nest/React production work unclear
